View this post on the web at https://3blue1brown.substack.com/p/potential-talk-in-the-bay-area

This is a bit of a strange request. I have a talk that I was planning to record and post as a video. It’s a beautiful piece of math, and most fun to deliver as a talk, so I arranged to have it recorded at a recent university visit with the intention of putting up the recording on 3blue1brown.
Unfortunately, there was a problem with the recording, and I can’t use it. It’s a shame, because I had my eye on letting this video go out in February while I work on a larger video for next month. Right now I’m contemplating two options:
Just make it into a regular video
Set up another occasion to give it as a talk, where I can record it again
I happen to be in the Bay Area this week, and I have no doubt there are plenty of places there with the kind of math enthusiasts who would enjoy spending an hour learning about a beautiful geometric formula that not enough people know about.
I realize this is relatively last-minute, but if anyone happens to have access to a nice venue there (something like a university auditorium is perfect) and wants to help set something up this week, I thought I’d reach out here to ask. If so, please feel free to send a message to info@3blue1brown.com
Thanks!
Grant
